reviews.review_description: An immersive experience with playing Yoke controller, bit hard when we start but after some time, it's easy to use. Expecting more features soon

This is ok for the price but lacks the ability to push and pull on the yoke and has no throttle so very limited gameplay atm. If the devs add hight control to the yoke then I'll up this to 5stars as atm it's very boaring gameplay.
*great but not what I was refering, since I can't reply directly to the devs I'll update this review without being able2reply to devs.
It's the x,y axis ((up/down) not the z)that needs to be incorporated to make this realistic vr else it's lacking.

developer_response.body:
Hi,
As we have introduced the yoke controller in just the last update so we have given the right and left controllers at the time but we will try to add more fun and better controlling system in upcoming updates.
Thank you
